sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), posted_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_messages (id, content, posted_at) VALUES (1, 'Message 1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_messages (id, content, posted_at) VALUES (2, 'Message 2', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 DAY');

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', 'From: "Test User" user@test.com
Subject: Test with NULL
Newsgroups: test.public

TEST with NULL is OK.

.
') + NULL;

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', 'From: "Test User" user@test.com
Subject: Test with empty string
Newsgroups: test.public

TEST with empty string is OK.

.') + '' AS combined_post;

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Adding Test
Newsgroups: test.public

' || CAST((1 + 1) AS VARCHAR) || ' is result.') AS post_result;

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', 'From: "Test User" user@test.com
Subject: Test Posting
Newsgroups: test.public

' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_messages) || ' messages posted.') AS final_post FROM DUAL;
CREATE TABLE user_details (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_email VARCHAR(100));

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', CONCAT('From: "', (SELECT user_email FROM user_details WHERE user_id = 1), '"
Subject: Dynamic Test
Newsgroups: dynamic.public

Dynamic test message with user email.

.')) AS dynamic_post;

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', 'From: "Test User" user@test.com
Subject: Group Test
Newsgroups: test.public

MAX ID: ' || (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_messages) || ' is the maximum ID posted.') AS group_test;
